field_values.action_summary: Dorothy and her companions arrive at the Emerald City gates, triumphant after defeating the Wicked Witch. They confront the authorities, demanding to see the Wizard to claim the rewards promised to them.
field_values.camera_intent: Wide shots of the group approaching the gate; Medium shots of the confrontation with the Guardian; Close-ups on Dorothy's determination
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Companions must exhibit heavy dirt and wear from the journey from the West
Dorothy must be in white clothing/dress as per visual evolution
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH015_SC001

## Production Intent
Establish the group's transition from travelers to victors by confronting authority at the emerald city gates. The visual tone must balance the physical exhaustion and grime of the journey with the high-status demand for promised rewards.

## Required Cast
- dorothy
- the_scarecrow
- tin_woodman
- cowardly_lion
- guardian_of_the_gates

## Required Environments
- emerald_city_gates

## Continuity Constraints
- Companions must exhibit heavy dirt and wear from the journey from the West
- Dorothy must be in white clothing/dress as per visual evolution

## Beat List
- BT001: Arrival at the gates
- BT002: The Confrontation
- BT003: The Demand for Justice
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
